taskId.title: Axesso Task ID (single)
taskId.description: One Axesso saved-task ID. Use this for a single product. Ignored if taskIds is also set.

taskIds.title: Axesso Task IDs (multiple)
taskIds.description: List of Axesso saved-task IDs to run in parallel (one per product). All results land in a single dataset.

axessoInput.title: Direct Axesso Input (JSON)
axessoInput.description: Raw Axesso actor input object. Used only when no taskId / taskIds is provided — lets you call the actor directly without a saved task.

filterMode.title: Filter Mode
filterMode.description: How to filter Axesso output rows before pushing to dataset.
